selected_important_turn.text: All of the additional water and food? That doesn't seem very fair. ☹️
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is one of the first clear pushbacks against the opponent's demand and sets a zero-sum, adversarial tone early. It signals unwillingness to concede and frames the rest of the negotiation as contested, which influences subsequent defensive responses from the opponent.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn is accusatory and emotive rather than constructive — it objects but doesn't offer tradeoffs, clarification, or alternatives. That made the exchange escalate to mutual justification rather than opening integrative possibilities where both needs could be met.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Replace or supplement the blunt complaint with a short, empathetic acknowledgement of their need plus a concrete, small request or conditional trade (e.g., acknowledge their trip needs and ask whether a split of extra water/food or a token water might work, or propose taking extra firewood in exchange for one water/one food). Ask a clarifying question rather than only labeling it unfair.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (opening to tradeoffs rather than locking into zero-sum)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (moves discussion toward concrete, balanced splits)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces defensive escalation, creates room to bargain)

value2reason.Low: I don't need food because I am skinny.
value2reason.Medium: I need firewood to stay warm at night.
value2reason.High: I need water because I get thirsty.

value2reason.Low: I need firewood to cook food for everyone as part of our friday night feast!
value2reason.Medium: For my backpacking expedition I will need additional water to split with everyone.
value2reason.High: I will need extra food as I am planning a backpacking expedition with a couple members that will require some food.

dialogue.text: Hello, I'm excited for our camping trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hey buddy, yes I'm so pumped for it.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Okay so I'm planning this super cool backpacking expedition up the waterfall but I'm going to need all the additional water and food for everyone.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: All of the additional water and food? That doesn't seem very fair. ☹️
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand you need food, but I'm more concerned about water and firewood. How about we split the water evenly and I take two firewood packages in exchange for one food package?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate the offer, but I need more food. How about I take two food packages and one water package, and you get one water and two firewood? It balances our needs better.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I see your need for food, but I'm prioritizing water and firewood. What if I take two water and one firewood, and you take one water, two firewood, and two food? It could balance our priorities.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think that works. Two food, one water for me, and one water, two firewood for you. Let’s confirm this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm okay with that split. Let me confirm: you take two food, one water, and I take one water and two firewood. That works for me.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed! I'll take two food and one water, and you get one water and two firewood. Let's head out and enjoy the trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
